title: Implement secretx-huawei-csms backend
description: Implement the Huawei Cloud CSMS (Cloud Secret Management Service) backend. Stub README exists at secretx-huawei-csms/README.md. URI: secretx:huawei-csms:<region>/<secret-name>. Auth via HUAWEI_CLOUD_ACCESS_KEY + HUAWEI_CLOUD_SECRET_KEY (ECS agency fallback). API endpoint: csms.<region>.myhuaweicloud.com. Part of the DEW umbrella service. Implements SecretStore and WritableSecretStore.
